html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Home Kits Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Home Kits Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Cottage Kit		 ×10 "A comfortable cozy facade."
Cottage Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Cozy Cottage.		 player_house_cottage_craft

Villa Kit		 ×30 "A towering elegant surface."
Villa Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Glorious Villa.		 player_house_villa_craft

Tudor Home Kit		 ×10 "The beauty of the middle ages."
Tudor Home Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Tudor Home.		 player_house_tudor_craft

Manor Kit		 ×30 "Ominously comfortable."
Manor Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Impressive Manor.		 player_house_manor_craft

Gothic Home Kit		 ×10 "Bats sold seperately."
Gothic Home Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Gothic Home.		 player_house_gothic_craft

Brick Home Kit		 ×10 "Proven better than wood and hay."
Brick Home Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Brick Home.		 player_house_brick_craft

Turreted Home Kit		 ×10 "Practical? Maybe. Cool? Probably."
Turreted Home Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Turreted Home.		 player_house_turret_craft

Gallery

  • Unused Home Kit
  • Unused Home Kit
  • Unused Home Kit
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Tab Icon.
The Home Kits Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Home Kits Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Cottage Kit
×10
"A comfortable cozy facade."
Cottage Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Cozy Cottage.
player_house_cottage_craft
“Builds a small domicile.”
–Wilson, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Stuff to build a small house.”
–Willow, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Wolfgang build little home.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Materials for a delusional life.”
–Wendy, when examining a Cottage Kit
“WILL HAVE ADEQUATE SYSTEM STORAGE”
–WX-78, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Materials for a quaint cottage.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Cottage Kit
“I'll build a nice little cottage for just the two of us.”
–Woodie, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Supplies for making a quaint abode.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Cottage Kit
“The elements to construct a cabin facade for my home.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Shelter fröm the elements.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Cool! We can build our own house!”
–Webber, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Hey if I can sleep in it, I'm good.”
–Walani, when examining a Cottage Kit
“I'll have to build the kitchen.”
–Warly, when examining a Cottage Kit
“I've built m'own ship. I ken handle this.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Cottage Kit
“WILBA CAN'ST MAKETH A HOME WITHAL”
–Wilba, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Makes home made of friends”
–Wormwood, when examining a Cottage Kit
“Some fancy coverings for my home.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Cottage Kit
Villa Kit
×30
"A towering elegant surface."
Villa Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Glorious Villa.
player_house_villa_craft
“Builds a considerable home.”
–Wilson, when examining a Villa Kit
“I can build this house and then burn it down.”
–Willow, when examining a Villa Kit
“Wolfgang build big house.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Villa Kit
“My home is with Abigail.”
–Wendy, when examining a Villa Kit
“WILL CONTAIN A SIZABLE AMOUNT OF MEMORY CACHE”
–WX-78, when examining a Villa Kit
“Elements to build a house.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Villa Kit
“Yep. This'll make a fine house.”
–Woodie, when examining a Villa Kit
“Materials for an acceptable domicile.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Villa Kit
“Theoretically, this will improve the appearance of my home.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Villa Kit
“I shall build a hall wörthy öf a shieldmaiden!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Villa Kit
“It's like when we built a tree fort.”
–Webber, when examining a Villa Kit
“I can sleep in luxury. But I gotta build it first.”
–Walani, when examining a Villa Kit
“I need to build it to throw a dinner party in it.”
–Warly, when examining a Villa Kit
“Argh. I'll put me ship buildin' skills t'work.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Villa Kit
“WILBA SHALL'T BUILDETH A BIG HOME”
–Wilba, when examining a Villa Kit
“Makes big home”
–Wormwood, when examining a Villa Kit
“A bundle of things to make my home nice and pretty.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Villa Kit
Tudor Home Kit
×10
"The beauty of the middle ages."
Tudor Home Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Tudor Home.
player_house_tudor_craft
“Builds a simple residence.”
–Wilson, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“A bunch of things to build a fancy house.”
–Willow, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“Wolfgang build fancy house.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“Ingredients for an empty life.”
–Wendy, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“WILL BE AN ACCEPTABLE REPOSITORY FOR GOODS”
–WX-78, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“Supplies for a home.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“I like the wood in this one.”
–Woodie, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“Bits for a rather snug house.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“Components to make the outside of my home more visually pleasing.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“Höuse! Prepare tö be built!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“This is going to take some work.”
–Webber, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“As long as the bed's not made of stone.”
–Walani, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“It'll do.”
–Warly, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“I miss m'crew fer tha hard labor jobs.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“'TIS THE MAKINGS O' MINE HOME”
–Wilba, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“Friends to build home”
–Wormwood, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
“Well, better get building.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Tudor Home Kit
Manor Kit
×30
"Ominously comfortable."
Manor Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Impressive Manor.
player_house_manor_craft
“Builds a sizable habitation.”
–Wilson, when examining a Manor Kit
“I'll build my own fireplace to set fires in.”
–Willow, when examining a Manor Kit
“Is stuff for house. Mighty like Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Manor Kit
“An exercise in futility.”
–Wendy, when examining a Manor Kit
“THIS HOME WILL HAVE MANY EXPANSION SLOTS”
–WX-78, when examining a Manor Kit
“Components for a rather large manor.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Manor Kit
“A lot of stone. Not sure I'll like it.”
–Woodie, when examining a Manor Kit
“Ah... materials for a home worthy of me.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Manor Kit
“Evidence would suggest I can improve my living arrangements.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Manor Kit
“I shall assemble it intö a hall wörthy öf Valhalla!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Manor Kit
“Wow. We can build a huge house with all this.”
–Webber, when examining a Manor Kit
“I wish this was already built.”
–Walani, when examining a Manor Kit
“With a house like this I need a kitchen staff.”
–Warly, when examining a Manor Kit
“Like buildin'a brigantine.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Manor Kit
“'TIS STUFFS DREAM HOUSES ARE MADE ON”
–Wilba, when examining a Manor Kit
“Makes REALLY big home”
–Wormwood, when examining a Manor Kit
“If only I could tie a balloon to this and float away.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Manor Kit
Gothic Home Kit
×10
"Bats sold seperately."
Gothic Home Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Gothic Home.
player_house_gothic_craft
“Builds a dwelling with some character.”
–Wilson, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“There's a lot of non-flammable wrought iron in this.”
–Willow, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“Is fancy things for fancy house.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“A house to remind me of death.”
–Wendy, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“THE RAIN WILL NOT HURT ME INSIDE HERE”
–WX-78, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“Materials for an ornamental house.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“Pretty fancy.”
–Woodie, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“I suppose this has a bit of charm to it.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“Evidently, I will have to build this myself.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“Rejöice! För it shall be mine höme!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“It's gonna look neat!”
–Webber, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“You mean I gotta build this myself?”
–Walani, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“A home with some flavor.”
–Warly, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“These ol' bones could still build s'methin'.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“SUCH STUFFS AS HOUSES ARE MADE ON”
–Wilba, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“Builds home”
–Wormwood, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
“For spookying my house up.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Gothic Home Kit
Brick Home Kit
×10
"Proven better than wood and hay."
Brick Home Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Brick Home.
player_house_brick_craft
“Builds a brickwork residence.”
–Wilson, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Brick isn't known for being flammable”
–Willow, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Bricks heavy but Wolfgang strong!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Heavy, like my heart.”
–Wendy, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“THIS HOME WILL BE SUITABLE”
–WX-78, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Bricks to build a solid home.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Never tried bricklaying, but I'll do my best.”
–Woodie, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Should suit my needs.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Paraphernalia to do some exterior home improvements.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Brick is nö match för my building skills!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Gosh, all these bricks are heavy.”
–Webber, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“All I need is a roof and a place to sleep and I'm happy.”
–Walani, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Can I build a brick firing oven too?”
–Warly, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Bricks be not good fer buildin'a ship.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“WILBA HATH SHELTER FROM WIND”
–Wilba, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“Rocks for home”
–Wormwood, when examining a Brick Home Kit
“You know this is all for show.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Brick Home Kit
Turreted Home Kit
×10
"Practical? Maybe. Cool? Probably."
Turreted Home Kit can be used to "renovate" Slanty Shanty into Turreted Home.
player_house_turret_craft
“Builds a reasonable shelter.”
–Wilson, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Ugh. Stone is so heavy. And fire-proof.”
–Willow, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Stones heavy but Wolfgang strong!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Still cannot shelter me from death.”
–Wendy, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“THIS HOME WILL FUNCTION ADEQUATELY”
–WX-78, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Ingredients for a roof over my head.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Do you like this one, Lucy?”
–Woodie, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Rather small. But I'll build it anyway.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Material for constructing a fine home exterior.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“I shall assemble it intö a wörthy dwelling!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Gosh. We'd love to live there.”
–Webber, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“How big are the bedrooms?”
–Walani, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“A sensible maison.”
–Warly, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Stone be not good fer buildin'a ship.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“A PIECE OF WORK FOR WILBA”
–Wilba, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“Builds pointy top home”
–Wormwood, when examining a Turreted Home Kit
“You could pop a balloon on that turret spike!”
–Wheeler, when examining a Turreted Home Kit

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thẻ Home Kits là một danh mục chế tạo dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Tab Đổi mới.
title: Home Kits Tab
